suite.name: Incident Report Api Test

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=https://deploy-production-88fa.up.railway.app/api, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://deploy-production-88fa.up.railway.app/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '52', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "tester1@ex.com", "password": "123456789"}'

kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://deploy-production-88fa.up.railway.app/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Cookie': 'token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW11b3NzdTEwMDFhZm5jbHg3cXliMDQ1Iiwicm9sZSI6IkRSSVZFUiIsImlhdCI6MTc3Mzc1NzgxMiwiZXhwIjoxNzczNzYxNDEyfQ.r6Sq9nvPbxO8L4kwSI1XHnLuvdm3sIJxWaohQ5RnqnM', 'Content-Length': '55', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "admin@example.com", "password": "123456789"}'

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

test.name: 1. User Should Be Able To Create An Incident

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.arg: description=รถชนท้ายกัน
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://deploy-production-88fa.up.railway.app/api/incidents/ path_url=/api/incidents/ headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW11b3NzdTEwMDFhZm5jbHg3cXliMDQ1Iiwicm9sZSI6IkRSSVZFUiIsImlhdCI6MTc3Mzc1NzgxMiwiZXhwIjoxNzczNzYxNDEyfQ.r6Sq9nvPbxO8L4kwSI1XHnLuvdm3sIJxWaohQ5RnqnM', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Cookie': 'token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW03NHM0NmswMDAwaGtvc3FvbWZ0ZXR3Iiwicm9sZSI6IkFETUlOIiwiaWF0IjoxNzczNzU3ODE0LCJleHAiOjE3NzM3NjE0MTR9.6HuY_WnRPh6P7tSKvOn-D3AZTXe9IRDvfTaDk1QtbQA', 'Content-Length': '109'} body=b'{"category": "ACCIDENT", "description": "\\u0e23\\u0e16\\u0e0a\\u0e19\\u0e17\\u0e49\\u0e32\\u0e22\\u0e01\\u0e31\\u0e19"}'

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

test.doc: ผู้ใช้สร้างการแจ้งเหตุใหม่ (POST /) โดยไม่ส่ง Location

test.name: 2. User Should Be Able To Get Their Own Incidents

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

test.name: 5. Admin Should Be Able To Get All Incidents

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

นาที","maneuver":null,"travel_mode":"DRIVING","end_location":{"lat":13.7561294,"lng":100.5050991},"start_location":{"lat":13.756323,"lng":100.5017626},"html_instructions":"มุ่งหน้าทางตะวันตกเฉียงเหนือ ไปยัง ถ. ดินสอ
ผ่าน บริษัท เทเวศประกันภัย จำกัด (มหาชน) สำนักงานใหญ่ (อีก 400ม. ทางซ้าย)
"},{"distance":"0.1 กม.","duration":"1 นาที","maneuver":null,"travel_mode":"DRIVING","end_location":{"lat":13.7564637,"lng":100.5059939},"start_location":{"lat":13.7561294,"lng":100.5050991},"html_instructions":"ขับต่อไปยัง AH123"},{"distance":"1.2 กม.","duration":"3 นาที","maneuver":null,"travel_mode":"DRIVING","end_location":{"lat":13.7616622,"lng":100.5154179},"start_location":{"lat":13.7564637,"lng":100.5059939},"html_instructions":"ขับต่อไปยัง ถ. นครสวรรค์
ผ่าน 7-Eleven สาขา พะเนียง (02853) (อีก 550ม. ทางซ้าย)
"},{"distance":"0.7 กม.","duration":"1 นาที","maneuver":"turn-right","travel_mode":"DRIVING","end_location":{"lat":13.7574069,"lng":100.520599},"start_location":{"lat":13.7616622,"lng":100.5154179},"html_instructions":"เลี้ยวขวา เข้าสู่ ถ. พิษณุโลก"},{"distance":"77 ม.","duration":"1 นาที","maneuver":null,"travel_mode":"DRIVING","end_location":{"lat":13.7570677,"lng":100.5212186},"start_location":{"lat":13.7574069,"lng":100.520599},"html_instructions":"ขับต่อไปยัง AH123"},{"distance":"0.1 กม.","duration":"1 นาที","maneuver":"ramp-left","travel_mode":"DRIVING","end_location":{"lat":13.7579623,"lng":100.5221461},"start_location":{"lat":13.7570677,"lng":100.5212186},"html_instructions":"เลี้ยวซ้าย เข้าสู่ทางลาด Phetchaburi Road

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.
